attributes.name: [AWS SQS OTel] Backlog bounded 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: Tracks queue capacity health per non-DLQ queue: 99.5% of 1-minute intervals must show maximum visible backlog below 1,000 messages. Growing ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible means producers are outpacing consumers. Threshold is workload-dependent — batch queues may legitimately hold more messages than real-time pipelines.

params.filter: data_stream.dataset: "aws.sqs.otel" AND attributes.Namespace: "AWS/SQS" AND attributes.MetricName: "ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible" AND attributes.stat: "Maximum" AND NOT attributes.QueueName: *dlq*
